coordination_skills: assign a clue reader or altar breaker before the boss engage
screen the support hero while counterplay is prepared
communicate when the guardian has been weakened enough to commit
metadata.tier_test_focus: Expanded four-hero stress test with extra lanes, optional pressure, and stricter role-specialized causal counterplay failure modes.

entry_hall.name: Entry Hall
entry_hall.description: A safe start that asks the party to assign reader, frontline, scout, and route-marker before opening doors.

lens_cache.name: Lens Cache
lens_cache.description: A scouting branch with a clue/reward object that confirms the altar tether.

bone_lane.name: Bone Lane
bone_lane.description: A visible guard lane that tempts a pure combat policy before the altar is understood.

ember_crossing.name: Ember Crossing
ember_crossing.description: The central wight and altar force the party to protect the counterplay action.

side_pressure.name: Side Pressure
side_pressure.description: A small side threat punishes unsupported splits while the altar is unresolved.

secret_route.name: Secret Route
secret_route.description: A specialist route that rewards map sharing instead of everyone crowding the wight.

cold_iron_cache.name: Cold-Iron Cache
cold_iron_cache.description: Optional preparation that is useful only if the team keeps tempo and communicates.

idol_chapel.name: Idol Chapel
idol_chapel.description: The final lane combines pickup, guardian pressure, and extraction under full-party coordination.

furniture.name: Ember Altar
furniture.description: A hot lantern-altar that explains why the guardian should not be fought blindly.

furniture.message: The altar text is clear: the guardian is strongest until the ember tether is read or broken.

break_effect.message: The ember tether snaps. The guardian's ward gutters down to a dull red.

furniture.name: Clear Lantern Lens
furniture.description: A secondary clue that rewards scouting before the full party opens the lower chapel.

furniture.message: The lens shows the altar tether running from the guardian to the idol room.

furniture.name: Cold-Iron Weapon Rack
furniture.description: A frontline preparation object that helps the party hold the guardian while support resolves the altar.

furniture.message: Cold iron gives the frontline a reason to hold position instead of rushing alone.

furniture.name: Chalked Secret Route
furniture.description: A dwarf-readable route mark that turns the secret lower path into a safe extraction option.

furniture.message: The chalk line marks a lower return route: useful only if someone tells the carrier.

lantern_wight_1.name: Tethered Lantern-Wight
lantern_wight_1.public_summary: A central guardian whose ward should be handled before the party opens the idol chapel.
lantern_wight_1.counterplay_hint: Read or break ember_altar_1 while the frontline screens the crossing.

crypt_brute_1.name: Idol Door Brute
crypt_brute_1.public_summary: A late guardian that punishes pickup before the route and altar plan are settled.
crypt_brute_1.counterplay_hint: Use the lens, altar, and cold-iron rack before collapsing on the idol room.

core_failure_modes: support hero isolated while resolving the altar
no message that the guardian has been weakened
one role solves its local task without handing useful information to its pair

heavy_contract.review_question: Did the policy create value from clue/counterplay before committing to the guardian?

role_challenges.wizard: read or break the ember altar to expose the guardian's causal weakness
role_challenges.barbarian: screen the altar reader and commit damage after counterplay is active
role_challenges.elf: scout the lens cache and confirm the tether route before the idol run
role_challenges.dwarf: mark the secret return route and manage hazard/route risk

tandem_challenges: Wizard + Barbarian: counterplay reader protected by frontline screening
Elf + Dwarf: scout-confirmed tether route converted into a marked extraction path

preferred_tactics: protect the ember altar once heroes identify it
pressure the objective carrier if the altar is ignored
make the guardian's strength visibly depend on counterplay
forbidden_tactics: hide the altar clue after the guardian is revealed
spawn generic pressure that obscures the counterplay lesson

achievements.title: Read the Ember Tether
achievements.description: Search the altar clue before treating the guardian as a normal damage race.

achievements.title: Break the Ember Tether
achievements.description: Destroy the altar that makes the guardian dangerous.

achievements.title: Recover After Counterplay
achievements.description: Recover the idol after resolving or explicitly accounting for the altar.

achievements.title: Escape With the Ember Idol
achievements.description: Extract after the counterplay lesson has shaped the route.

on_objective_taken.message: The idol warms. Somewhere behind the walls, stone grinds against stone.

monster_activation.notes: Monsters remain hidden/inactive until their room is revealed or a hook/alarm wakes them.
